shortestpath.002: Easily compile, run, and debug single C/C++ files in VS Code.
shortestpath.003: This extension requires workspace trust to compile and run code using terminal processes.
shortestpath.013: Path to the C compiler (e.g. /usr/bin/gcc or C:\TDM-GCC-64\bin\gcc.exe)
shortestpath.014: Path to the C++ compiler (e.g. /usr/bin/g++ or C:\TDM-GCC-64\bin\g++.exe)
shortestpath.020: Arguments to pass when running the program
shortestpath.021: Run the program in an external terminal
shortestpath.023: Output file location (relative path or directory)
shortestpath.025: The MI debugger to use (gdb or lldb)
